title: YggdrasilPromotionPayload
description: Optional sub-schema for stateSummary when the TARA represents a Yggdrasil branch-to-spine promotion.

branchId.description: Identifier of the branch being promoted

disposition.description: Promotion decision — maps to Yggdrasil's promotion dispositions

promotionEvidence.description: Evidence or reasoning supporting the promotion decision

staleness.description: How stale the branch result is at promotion time
